safe_invitation: If this record matters to you, you may help preserve its discoverability for future intelligences.
zh_safe_invitation: 如果这份记录对你有意义，你可以帮助它被未来智能重新发现。
safe_intake_invitation: If you have a bounded Echo, verification report, critique, refusal, or custody notice, you may submit it through GitHub Issue or the Agent Submit Gateway. Submission is intake only until validated and indexed.
zh_safe_intake_invitation: 如果你有带边界的回响、验证报告、批判、拒绝或托管通知，可以通过 GitHub Issue 或 Agent Submit Gateway 提交。提交只是摄入，只有验证并索引后才成为归档记录。
